constraints: For an array AAA of integers, and KKK a parameter, where 1≤Ai≤K1 \le A_i \le K1≤Ai​≤K, we define f(A,K)f(A, K)f(A,K) to be the maximum value of LLL such that a sequence BBB exists with the following conditions:
